_notes.purpose: EC2 Spot GPU CE for sustained credit burn. Workload = FAISS index build on full jpcite corpus + sentence-transformers re-embed on T4/A10G. NO LLM API. Open-weight models only.
_notes.instance_types_rationale: g4dn.4xlarge (16 vCPU/64 GB/1× T4 @ ~$0.48/hr) cheapest GPU spot; g5.4xlarge (16 vCPU/64 GB/1× A10G @ ~$0.77/hr) faster GPU; g4dn.8xlarge (32 vCPU/128 GB/1× T4 @ ~$0.97/hr) bigger memory; g5.8xlarge (32 vCPU/128 GB/1× A10G @ ~$0.83/hr 1c spot). SPOT_CAPACITY_OPTIMIZED picks lowest interruption risk × cost.
_notes.ami_type: ECS_AL2_NVIDIA — Amazon Linux 2 NVIDIA-optimized ECS AMI (includes NVIDIA driver + nvidia-docker2 + CUDA runtime in container). Required for AWS Batch GPU resource requirement.
_notes.quota_check: Spot G/VT quota = 64 vCPU (ap-northeast-1) — 128 maxvCpus exceeds it. Override: maxvCpus 64 to fit current quota. Submit quota increase request later. Effective ceiling = 64 vCPU = 4× g4dn.4xlarge or 4× g5.4xlarge or 2× g4dn.8xlarge.
_notes.budget_cap: $1,000 for this batch (operator can re-run). Auto-stop tag 2026-05-29 honored by jpcite-aws-auto-stop Lambda. Spot rate $0.48-0.97/hr × 4 instances × 24h = $46-93/day.
